claim_text: The paper subset contains promoted flare and reference experiments with stable registry gating.
First excess-ice onset occurs within minutes of seeding in the promoted flare subset.
Promoted flare runs show measurable excess ice relative to matched references.
The pilot early-window matrix identifies a repeatable dominant frozen-number pathway.
The pilot early-window matrix identifies the main competing liquid-number pathway.
The promoted growth summary supports a coherent power-law growth regime along plume trajectories.
Tracked plume ridges grow into large-particle sizes on the order of hundreds of micrometers.
The compact cloud phase-budget summary provides a stable context table for the promoted overview case.
